Synovial Fluid Analysis

Synovial Fluid Analysis 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a synovial fluid analysis? 
A synovial fluid analysis is a group of tests that looks for changes in your synovial fluid. These tests check for the cause of pain and swelling in your joints. Joints are places in the body where two bones meet, such as your knees, shoulders, hips, hands, and feet. Synovial fluid, also known as joint fluid, is a thick li
